ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange (e.g., New York Stock Exchange) */,
  "exchange_code" TEXT /* Code for the stock exchange (e.g., NYSE) */,
  "exchange_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the stock exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* The official website of the stock exchange */,
  "founding_date" TEXT /* The date when the stock exchange was founded */,
  "location" TEXT /* The city or country where the stock exchange is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listed_companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock exchange where the company is listed */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "company_code" TEXT /* Code for the company (e.g., ticker symbol) */,
  "company_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* The industry in which the company operates */,
  "sector" TEXT /* The sector in which the company operates */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* The date when the company's initial public offering (IPO) took place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listed_companies_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price record */,
  "price" TEXT /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "open" TEXT /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high" TEXT /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low" TEXT /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "change_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage change in stock price from the previous day */,
  "trade_volume" INTEGER /* The total number of shares traded on a given day */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* The market capitalization of the company on a given day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES listed_companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "real_time_feeds" (
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each real-time feed record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the real-time feed record */,
  "price" TEXT /* Current price of the stock */,
  "open" TEXT /* Opening price of the stock on the current day */,
  "high" TEXT /* Highest price of the stock on the current day */,
  "low" TEXT /* Lowest price of the stock on the current day */,
  "change_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage change in stock price from the previous day */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The timestamp when the real-time feed was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_real_time_feeds_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES listed_companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, investor, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* The user's password (hashed for security) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The user's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* The user's address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_tools" (
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics tool */,
  "tool_name" TEXT /* Name of the analytics tool */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the analytics tool */,
  "tool_type" TEXT /* Type of analytics tool (e.g., technical, fundamental) */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* A detailed description of the analytics tool */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_tool_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the tool */,
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analytics tool being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the tool was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the user accessed the tool */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_tool_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_tool_access_tool_id FOREIGN KEY ("tool_id") REFERENCES analytics_tools ("tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market trend record */,
  "trend" TEXT /* Trend of the stock price (e.g., increasing, decreasing, stable) */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., increasing, decreasing, stable) */,
  "trend_strength" TEXT /* Strength of the trend (e.g., weak, strong) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES listed_companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pattern_recognition" (
  "pattern_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pattern recognition record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the pattern recognition record */,
  "pattern" TEXT /* Pattern recognized in the stock price data (e.g., head and shoulders, triangle) */,
  "pattern_type" TEXT /* Type of pattern recognized (e.g., reversal, continuation) */,
  "pattern_strength" TEXT /* Strength of the pattern (e.g., weak, strong) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pattern_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pattern_recognition_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES listed_companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_decisions" (
  "decision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment decision */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the decision */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the decision was made */,
  "decision" TEXT /* Investment decision made (e.g., buy, sell, hold) */,
  "investment_type" TEXT /* Type of investment decision (e.g., long-term, short-term) */,
  "investment_amount" TEXT /* Amount invested */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_decisions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_decisions_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES listed_companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "auditing" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., login, logout, data access) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_auditing_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the security record */,
  "security_level" TEXT /* Security level of the company (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "security_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the security */,
  "security_level_description" TEXT /* A description of the security level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES listed_companies ("company_id")
)
